JugadoresHistoricos.heroSubtitle: The players who made history at the Villamarín
JugadoresHistoricos.heroDescription: From the 70s classics to the 2022 Copa del Rey champions. A journey through the legends who built Real Betis Balompié.
JugadoresHistoricos.ctaHeading: Share the Betis passion with us
JugadoresHistoricos.ctaDescription: Experience every match surrounded by fellow béticos in Edinburgh.

Joaquin.metaDescription: The best moments and jokes from Joaquín Sánchez, Real Betis legend. The man who turned every press conference into a comedy show.
Joaquin.heroSubtitle: The man who turned football into comedy
Joaquin.heroDescription: Joaquín Sánchez wasn't just one of the best players in Real Betis history — he was the life of the party. For over 20 years he turned every dressing room, press conference and interview into a comedy show unique in football.
Joaquin.momentsDescription: A look back at the funniest moments from the Betis legend. Each one linked to video so you can see it first-hand.
Joaquin.ctaDescription: Joaquín taught us that being a bético is about more than football. It's laughter, tears, celebrations and always coming back.
Joaquin.moment1Description: During the 2020 lockdown, Joaquín became Spain's showman with his Instagram lives. Hundreds of thousands tuned in each night to hear dressing room stories, impressions of teammates and jokes about life in quarantine. He broke every audience record in Spain.
Joaquin.moment2Description: Every Joaquín visit to El Hormiguero was a show. Pablo Motos couldn't stop laughing. From impressions of teammates to Betis dressing-room anecdotes, he turned every interview into a stand-up monologue that went viral instantly.
Joaquin.moment3Description: No teammate escaped a birthday made in Joaquín. Armed with a cake and a taste for chaos, his dressing-room ambushes were shared thousands of times on social media. The Betis comms team knew: Joaquín + birthday = guaranteed viral content.
Joaquin.moment4Description: Reporters counted the days to interview Joaquín. His press conferences were more entertaining than most comedy shows. What began as tactical analysis always ended in shared laughter, with reporters fighting to keep a straight face.
Joaquin.moment5Description: When Betis lifted the Copa del Rey in 2022 after a penalty shootout against Valencia, Joaquín was the heart of the celebration. At 40, dancing on the open-top bus through Seville, mic in hand, leading half a million fans in chants. He proved you can lift a trophy and do stand-up at the same time.
Joaquin.moment6Description: His farewell ceremony at the Villamarín in June 2023 was pure Joaquín. 60,000 people came to say goodbye, and even at his most emotional he still made the whole stadium laugh. A career that ended exactly as it should: between tears of emotion and laughter.

Partidos.modalEventDescription: Confirm your attendance to watch the match with the peña

Unete.heroSubtitle: Three things you need to know
Unete.card2Description: Follow us to stay up to date with matches, plans and photos from the peña.
Unete.card3Outro: Just turn up, say you're a bético and you're one of us.
Unete.visitorDescription: Tourists, students, short-term workers... if you're a bético in Edinburgh, this is the place for you. We love meeting fellow béticos from all over Spain and making them feel at home.
Unete.ctaDescription: The next match could be the perfect moment to meet us.

Nosotros.heroSubtitle: More than a supporters club — we're family
Nosotros.origenesPara1Rest: - Juan Morata and José María Conde ran into each other playing football in Edinburgh. Both were wearing Betis shirts.
Nosotros.origenesPara2: That coincidence sparked a great Betis friendship and the first official Real Betis supporters club in the United Kingdom.
Nosotros.origenesQuote: "The idea came over a drink in a pub. They just decided there and then."
Nosotros.familiaPara1Pre: Since 2010, we've welcomed Betis fans from across Spain living in Scotland, exchange students, passing tourists...
Nosotros.familiaPara2: We've celebrated promotions, trophies and unique moments together. We've also cried over defeats and consoled each other with the certainty that "next year will be ours".
Nosotros.familiaFooter: Recognised by LaLiga as a "stronghold" of béticos in Scotland
Nosotros.legado2010: First official Betis supporters club in the United Kingdom
Nosotros.legado2015: New home at the Polwarth Tavern
Nosotros.legadoFooter: Every bético who joins adds a new chapter to our story
Nosotros.ctaTitle: Want to be part of our story?
Nosotros.ctaDescription: Your story can become part of ours too.

HomePage.heroDescription: All Betis fans are welcome. No matter where you're from, here you have a family that shares your passion for Betis.
